description: Triggers when implementing technical SEO in Next.js — Metadata API, robots.ts, sitemap.ts, schema components, Core Web Vitals optimizations, hreflang, or programmatic page generation
should_trigger: Implement the Next.js Metadata API with Open Graph and Twitter Card tags for my app router project
Set up dynamic sitemap generation in Next.js 15 that includes blog posts from my CMS
Create a BreadcrumbSchema React component using JSON-LD for Next.js
Optimize LCP and CLS in my Next.js app — hero image is too slow
Implement hreflang alternates for my Italian/English/Czech Next.js app
Generate programmatic SEO pages in Next.js using generateStaticParams for 200 cities
Should I use SSG, SSR, or ISR for my e-commerce product pages for best SEO?
should_not_trigger: Write keyword-optimized blog content for my SaaS
Create a full site SEO audit report
